{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elysian virtues
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]]'s [[Incarnation]] manifests [[Elysian virtues]]: honest, compassionate, wise, patient, valiant, loyal, merciful, and diligent.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian virtues]] would not allow [[Alin]] to attack his new allies.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
